metadata.description: Claude Code plugins for AI coding agent delegation: Claude, Codex, OpenCode.

plugins.name: claude
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to a second Claude Code instance.

plugins.name: codex
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to Codex from Claude Code.

plugins.name: opencode
plugins.description: Delegate tasks and code reviews to OpenCode from Claude Code.

plugins.name: llms-choreographer
plugins.description: Workflow patterns: LLM council, parallel review, parallel debug, second opinion, vote.
